name: Morphous Chameleon
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible adaptive settings system to be coded from the Chameleon light and dark design-system boards: lime actions, teal state changes, ochre focus, bark-brown depth, and adaptive scale texture. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme.
typography: Geist for adaptive settings UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for control labels, headings, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Configurable 8px grids, scale-chip controls, branch-like navigation, settings panels, and adaptive state surfaces.
